rationale: No direct conflict. The proposed homestead exemption increase would reduce local property tax revenue, which feeds into the statewide average state-and-local funding per student under §29.361(a)(1) and (c)(2). However, the statute uses a formula that self-adjusts annually; no amendment or rulemaking is required for the statute to operate.
quote: 85 percent of the estimated statewide average amount of state and local funding per student in average daily attendance for the most recent school year for which that information is available, as provided by the agency
_note: The proposed Tax Code change indirectly affects the local-funding input to the §29.361 transfer calculation but does not contradict any operative provision of the statute.
